column2: ### create pretty color palette for our graphs
## n = 3, because we want 3 colors for 3 phages.
ggplot(data.group, aes(moi.log, pfu.avg, fill=virus, colour=virus)) + geom_point() + geom_smooth(method="lm")  +

stat_regline_equation(aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~~"))) + xlab("Infecting Virus to Bacteria Ratio") + ylab("Number of Entrapped Spores") + scale_fill_manual(values=my.pal) + scale_color_manual(values=my.pal) + theme(legend.title = element_blank()) + scale_y_continuous(labels=label_scientific()) +scale_y_log10() + scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(-6,-4,-2,0), labels=c("1,000,000:1", "10,000:1",  "100:1", "1:1"))
